programme.title: The Carson City Kid
programme.desc: The Carson City Kid Roy Rogers stops stagecoaches traveling between Wild West mining towns searching their mail sacks for letters addressed to Morgan Reynolds the man who killed his brother Discovering that Reynolds operates a saloon under the name Lee Jessup Bob Steele the Kid takes a job as the saloons bouncer While vying with Reynolds for the affections of singer Joby Madison Pauline Moore the Kid discovers a swindled miner Noah Beery Jr who claims to be the Carson City Kid

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: DefaultFiller
programme.desc: DefaultFiller

programme.title: Adventures of the Wilderness Family
programme.desc: The Robinson family decide to leave city life behind for one of clean living in the wilderness for the sake of their daughters health There they learn the value of family as they become closer to nature

programme.title: Endless summer
programme.desc: The crown jewel to ten years of Bruce Brown surfing documentaries Brown follows two young surfers around the world in search of the perfect wave and ends up finding quite a few in addition to some colorful local characters

programme.title: The Long Shadow
programme.desc: Sun Hill is forced to accept the legacy of DS Beech and Meadows discovers that he is not the only one with a questionable past

programme.title: Tornado Down Operation Desert Storm
programme.desc: Operation Desert Storm was only a day old when Tornado pilots John Peters and John Nichol were shot down in Iraqi territory and subsequently tortured and paraded on TV Bruised and battered the two men mumbled incoherently into the camera and instantly became symbols around the world of Saddam’s savagery and aggression In Tornado Down the two pilots break their silence and in a series of moving and candid interviews reveal the physical and psychological torment they suffered at the hands of their captors; the brutal torture sessions; the elation of their release; and their determination not to crack in the face of such cruelty and humiliation

programme.title: The Forgotten Gunners Of WWI
programme.desc: The team explores the grounds around Belton House near Grantham which were home to thousands of men training for frontline duties in WWI

programme.title: Cities At War - Berlin
programme.desc: Berlin - The Doomed City Berlin was under air attack throughout the war - from the British and the Americans and then the Russians

programme.title: The Lancaster At War
programme.desc: The incredible story of the Avro Lancaster one of the finest bombers of the Second World War which played a crucial role in the long and savage campaign to defeat Hitlers Third Reich This documentary features interviews with surviving veterans of Bomber Command who share frank personal accounts of their part in an aerial battle of attrition which claimed the lives of 55000 aircrew

programme.title: Shaolin Super Dragon
programme.desc: Shaolin Super Dragon

programme.title: Invincible Super Chan
programme.desc: Invincible Super Chan

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: During a camping trip the men begin to wonder if their female tracker is a vampire Meanwhile two plane crash survivors whove been feasting on dead passengers are on the verge of rescue when an escaped killer intervenes

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A housewife stressed out by her husbands reckless behavior welcomes an elderly cosmetics saleswoman in to her home Only to discover that the old hag has another more devious motive

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: hen funeral director Ezra Thornberry gets his very polite young nephew Bobby as a roommate he eventually learns his rude harsh behavior towards him could be fatal

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Cold ruthless Kay Mason runs a garment factory and treats her illegal Mexican immigrant workers in a cruel inhumane manner Kay meets her match in Victor a handsome mysterious young Mexican in whom Kay develops an amorous interest

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A flashy businessman finds out he owns a slum apartment building and is unwilling to make repairs until strange things begin to happen to him

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Knight 318
programme.desc: Knight 318

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A racist uses a cursed antique car radio to travel back to 1954 and tries to prevent the arrest and death of his father a member of the KKK

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet
programme.desc: An invisible demon in the cargo hold of a jet airliner terrorizes the passengers

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways discover that a celebrated eccentric artist is on the island and they try to trick him into wanting to return to civilization so that they can use his transmitter

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A Latin American dictator is exiled to the island and he immediately declares himself dictator of the island with Gilligan as his puppet leader in training

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Grandpa and Luke jeopardize Kates chances to be named to a church committee when they unwittingly allow a Las Vegas gambling house to advertise on the McCoys barn

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Much to Grampas consternation George wants to join a private club known as the Loyal Order of the Mystic Nile

programme.title: Smart 511
programme.desc: Smart 511

programme.title: Smart 501
programme.desc: Smart 501

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ travels to Florida to visit his war buddy Charlie Broler but a helicopter crash cuts short the friendly reunion BJ and an eager marine patrolwoman set to work unraveling the mystery Musical performances from Sister Sledge and Jim Stafford highlight the episode

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur buys a pair of pearl earrings as a surprise for Carol on her birthday but a home burglar has other plans for them

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Both Carol and Ed want Wilbur to hire a famous decorator to redo the house and stable in a Hawaiian Modern motif

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In a plot to get to an airplane with a silent engine Hogan gets Klink to believe that he is psychic

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: An African prince comes to Stalag 13 who is negotiating with the Germans for the rights in his country to build a submarine base and Hogan replaces him with Kinchloe

programme.title: Mchale 318
programme.desc: Mchale 318

programme.title: Mchale 406
programme.desc: Mchale 406

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter receives anonymous love letters

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Genghis Khan
programme.desc: During the thirteenth century the shy Mongol boy Temujin Carlo Cura becomes the fearless leader Genghis Khan Omar Sharif who unites all Mongol tribes and conquers most of Asia Europe and the Middle East

programme.title: Becket
programme.desc: King Henry II of England comes to terms with his affection for his close friend and confidant Thomas Becket who finds his true honor by observing Gods divine will rather than the Kings

programme.title: Morning Departure
programme.desc: Trouble arises when 12 men realize that only eight of them can escape from the sinking submarine that has collided with a mine left over from the war

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: An Englishman with a grudge against an insurance company for a disallowed claim fakes his own death but is soon pursued by an insurance investigator

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: The FBI approaches Uncle Jesse to allow Boss to stay at the Duke farm since he is a key witness in an upcoming trial for one of the Souths most notorious racketeers The reason is because the mob boss has placed a huge bounty on Boss head and has hitmen all over Hazzard County who will stop at nothing to prevent him from testifying While Boss is in hiding Rosco takes over his little fat buddys administrative duties relishing the absolute authority that comes with the job

programme.title: Hercules 106
programme.desc: Hercules 106

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: A high profile mission to Mars is suddenly canceled much to the dismay of the public Involved air force captain Paul Chandler steals Lilis shuttle

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Morthren have developed a time machine Malzor travels back to 1953 to inject his invading predecessors with an immunity drug to Earths bacteria so theyll complete their original mission of obliterating mankind and colonizing the planet Blackwood and Kinkaid arrive at the aliens research facility and follow Malzor into the past to try and stop him

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an attempt on Dr Alec Hollands life leaves him consumed by deadly chemicals and fire the swamps of Louisiana transform him into a superhuman creature hell-bent on ridding the swamp--and the world--of the evil that men do

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A vessel of alien pacifists bound for Earth lands on the moon They are greeted as friends by all- except Commissioner Simmons who sees their vessel as way to return home

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Young 320
programme.desc: Young 320

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A traveling hit-woman seduces Inspector Keller gaining valuable intelligence for her San Francisco assignments A mob hired her to help win a gang war which Keller is investigating Kellers superior Lt Mike Stone hears wedding bells but death knells are more likely as shes living in a bay-side apartment next to the younger love-struck Keller

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Taggert a US industrialist has acquired a jade figure which has great religious significance to Kuala Rokat That nation is a small but strategically located nation which borders China Taggerts acquisition threatens to undo years of sensitive US diplomacy but there is no legal way to force him to give the figure back Phelps devises a plan which among other things calls for causing havoc with Taggerts mainframe computer Rollin impersonating an academic from Kuala Rokat and using a highly trained cat in getting the jade away from Taggert

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Joe and Bill are assigned a task to find a purse snatcher They are surprised to learn it is a dog snatching the purses

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A beat police officer asks Sergeant Friday to be his counselor before a review board The office is accused of accepting a bribe

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: After three police officers are murdered Kimble David Janssen the new stranger in town becomes the obvious suspect His situation is complicated by his boss William Shatner a former cop who suffers from a mysterious psychiatric problem

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: As Heath settles into life in the Valley his authority is questioned by the men employed to aid him in a huge cattle drive which is further complicated by the arrival of a former general with plans of his own

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne is asked by an Army hero before he dies to help his son enlist in the Army Cheyenne succeeds but the young man becomes disillusioned because of his horse and a head strong post commander who also is causing an Indian uprising

programme.title: Beneath the Planet of the Apes
programme.desc: Time-displaced astronaut Taylor and the mute Nova[a] travel through the desert of the Forbidden Zone in search of a new life away from Ape City Without warning fire shoots up from the ground and chasms open Confused by this Taylor investigates a cliff wall and disappears through it Unable to reach him Nova is left alone

programme.title: Freddys Return A Nightmare Reborn
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents Although he was rescued by the detective that arrested Krueger he was left scarred emotionally and psychologically 13 years have passed and Kevins family has moved back to Elm Street stirring up Kevins darkest memories A weakened desperate Freddy trapped in the dream world by his mother a nun named Sister Mary Helena following the events of Nightmare 5 has caught Kevins scent the one that got away

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Nate Oses learns from everyone he can, including some of the top fighters in MMA. He aspires not only to be a well-prepared fighter but to eventually move on to be a coach and mentor himself, helping to form great fighters in the future.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Going from dancing to fighting is not as drastically different as you might think! Chaleur Jones prioitizes balancing good health and her busy lifestyle to maximize her training.

programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 29 filmed at the Century Casino in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Nick Agallar v. Nardu Debrah

programme.desc: Michele Mirabella v. Chris Stebbeds

programme.title: The Empress Interview
programme.desc: Join me as the lovely Empress returns to the Sherard Show as a new mother and hit maker

programme.title: The Sherard Show Celebrates Sherards 50th Birthday
programme.desc: Join me as I celebrate a milestone in life as well as on the show Featuring special guests Felix Mcnulty Jennifer Santos and the beautiful Irina Voornina

programme.title: The Sam Kwasman Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who is the original voice of Donald Duck-Mr Sam Kwasman Also the legendary Freda Payne returns to the show to speak about her recent Induction

programme.title: The Annalisa Guidone Interview
programme.desc: The lovely actress Annalisa stops by the show to talk about the dark side of being a female in the industry

programme.title: The Kendall Ferguson Interview
programme.desc: The hilarious Chicago Comedian Kendall Ferguson returns to the show to talk about his new book and why he needs to stop stealing

programme.title: The DC Glenn Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: Meet the man who created a 90s anthem that set the trend for Hip Hop Music today

programme.title: The Cynda Williams Interview
programme.desc: Meet the lady who became a star in the 1990s hit movie Mo Betta Blues Hear how selling herself out to become rich was and still isnt an option

programme.title: The Chico Brown Exclusive Interview
programme.desc: From being the Co-defendant to Rick Ross to becoming a successful film maker Chico Brown stops by the show to set the record straight

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Monster Minds are planted aboard the Pride to contaminate the water supply The water is jettisoned forcing Herc to land the Pride in search of water and a Cobalt-49 crystal to repair the guidance system damaged by the vines This is all part of Saw Boss trap Flora sees the vines and goes to warn Gillian who is searching for a crystal They are trapped and Gillian falls off a bridge into a river Saw Boss sets another trap knowing Jayce will return for Gillian but Jayce calls upon the ring for help and defeats the Monster Minds and rescues Gillian

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: To lure Jayce to his death Saw Boss puts a marker in the shape of the root on an ice planet that is about to be destroyed by a volcano Herc lands the Pride on the ice which is then nearly covered by an avalanche The native people seek help from Jayce and everyone goes to work building an ice dam and storing up snow to drop into the volcano Monster Minds attack complicating things but they end up helping the people when their lasers blast the dam which prevents the volcano from erupting when all the ice covers it up

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Scott and T-Bob find the treasure of Brian Boru at the end of an Irish rainbow but VENOM soon finds out and tries to get it for themselves

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Two boys find a mock-up of a Space Shuttle in the Everglades VENOM is after the actual thing Alex Sector takes over as MASK leader after Matt Trakker is bitten by a snake

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: A Decisive Battle!! Axe

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: The Decayed Body

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain is hypnotizing residents of an Earth-like world with a special kind of newspaper ink The N team encounters a guy named Julio who tries to get to the bottom of this hypnotic business and is the only one who is not under the effect of the hypnosis The N team discovers that Julio is actually illiterate

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin is feeling under the weather since he caught a video virus His friends must help him so they shrink themselves and go inside Kevins body to fight the virus

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters a unicorn being attacked They manage to help the Unicorn but Uni is captured by a wizard who is capturing Unicorns and stealing their magical horns They must stop the wizard before he become even more powerful than Venger

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Dungeon Master is captured by an evil lord working for Venger The kids must find Dungeon Master and free him before its too late

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Pirate Island

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget Penny and Brains Caribbean holiday is interrupted by a gang of MAD pirates

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Leader-1 is shot by Crasher while attempting to destroy Cy-Kills pulsar generator

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Scooter and Turbo struggle to free Matt Nick and AJ from the pulsar generators spell
